scripts.dev:capacitor-ios: pnpm exec sdkwork-app dev --root ../.. --runtime-target capacitor-ios --deployment-profile standalone
scripts.dev:capacitor-android: pnpm exec sdkwork-app dev --root ../.. --runtime-target capacitor-android --deployment-profile standalone
scripts.build:capacitor-ios: cap sync && cap copy ios && cap open ios
scripts.build:capacitor-ios:full: tsc && vite build --mode production && cap sync && cap copy ios
scripts.build:capacitor-android: cap sync && cap copy android && cap open android
scripts.build:capacitor-android:full: tsc && vite build --mode production && cap sync && cap copy android
scripts.dev:browser:standalone: pnpm exec sdkwork-app dev --root ../.. --runtime-target browser --deployment-profile standalone
scripts.dev:browser:cloud: pnpm exec sdkwork-app dev --root ../.. --runtime-target browser --deployment-profile cloud
scripts.dev:browser:postgres:standalone: pnpm exec sdkwork-app dev --root ../.. --runtime-target browser --deployment-profile standalone
